description: CompositionBlue and white printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with an insert, three quarter sleeves with panel on the cuffs, embroidery on the front, has a cut out design and a vented hem with panel on the hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold water using a mild detergentCrafted from soft fabric, this kurta from aneri is sure to offer exemplary comfort. Team it with leggings, sandals and chunky ethnic earrings.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
